title: Evaluation of HHB 67 like Pearl Millet Hybrids under Dryland Condition
abstract: HHB 67 is an early maturing (60-62 days) pearl millet hybrid, released and notified byGoverment of India in 1990 for general cultivation in alllthe pearl millet growing areas o f the country(Kapoor etal.., 1989) The hybrid did specially well in dryland regions of Haryana and Rajasthan(Approximately 50% Pearl millet area of India)...............
